steps.title: Keep the modifier parallel
steps.content: The phrase enacted in 2010 and ______ three of these features modifies Kyrgyzstan's constitution. The blank needs a participial modifier, not a new finite verb.

steps.title: Avoid finite verbs
steps.content: A, B, and D create finite verb forms that disrupt the modifying phrase after constitution. A present participle works in parallel with the existing modifier and describes what the constitution has. The answer is C.
